codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original writer-positioning commit together with the current writer implementation. The feature requirements around MR-version-based positioning, path/line targeting, structured body rendering, fallback linkage, same-line separation, and downstream lifecycle resolution are covered by the current code and regression tests; no user-impacting issues remain in scope.

summary: Reviewed the worker handoff, transcript skeleton, commit `e1f4a49a690625f5700797e093314bfc4c37edeb`, and the current `internal/writer` code/tests. The previously reported discussion-linkage risk has been addressed in the current implementation, and the feature now satisfies the positioning/body behavior plus lifecycle linkage expected for comment-writer scope.
